text.title: Partnership Co-Marketing Playbook Failure Modes
text.summary: Antipatterns observed in real deployments of Partnership Co-Marketing Playbook. Each pairs symptom + sourced root-cause + concrete fix.

antipattern.symptom: Partner audiences overlap 20%; joint webinar attracts 80 signups, 2 fit either ICP.
antipattern.fix: Re-score partner candidates; require >=60% overlap evidence before commit.

antipattern.symptom: Partner with 100k list collaborates with 1k-list partner; bigger side feels exploited; relationship sours.
antipattern.fix: Restrict partnerships to within-3x audience-size band; build smaller audience first if mismatch persists.

antipattern.symptom: Webinar runs; no UTM + survey; team cannot tell which side drove signups; no second collab.
antipattern.fix: Pre-wire shared UTM + 2-question post-event survey + lead-split agreement.
